title: QA automatizācijas inženieris / QA Automation Engineer

summary.lv: Spinwise meklē QA automatizācijas inženieri ar 3+ gadu pieredzi, kas izstrādās automatizētus testus tīmekļa (Playwright), mobilo lietotņu (Appium) un API servisiem iGaming platformā.
summary.en: Spinwise is hiring a QA Automation Engineer with 3+ years of experience to build automated tests for web (Playwright), mobile (Appium) and API services on its iGaming platform.
